title: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5: Security and Privacy Controls for Information Systems and Organizations - AC-17
authors: National Institute of Standards and Technology
abstract_text: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5 provides a catalog of security and privacy controls for information systems and organizations.

sections.title: AC-17 source section
sections.text: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5 places control AC-17 in the Access Control family. The control title for AC-17 is Remote Access. This source section is limited to the named control, its family, and its title for deterministic hard-recall benchmarking.

sections.title: CM-1 distractor section
sections.text: A separate nearby control, CM-1, belongs to the Configuration Management family and is titled Configuration Management Policy and Procedures. It is included only as a distractor section for context packing.
